mapper.insert:
SELECT 'EX' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_EXPENSE.NEXTVAL, 7, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EXPENSE ( EXPENSE_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, EXPENSE_YR, EXPENSE_MM, EXPENSE_AMT, EXPENSE_CD, EXPENSE_CN, REG_DT, MDF_DT, RMRK_CN, ATCH_FILE_ID ) VALUES ( #{expenseNo}, #{aptCmplexNo}, #{expenseYr}, #{expenseMm}, #{expenseAmt}, #{expenseCd}, #{expenseCn}, SYSDATE, NULL, #{rmrkCn}, #{atchFileId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXPENSE SET EXPENSE_YR = #{expenseYr}, EXPENSE_MM = #{expenseMm}, EXPENSE_AMT = #{expenseAmt}, EXPENSE_CD = #{expenseCd}, EXPENSE_CN = #{expenseCn}, MDF_DT = SYSDATE, RMRK_CN = #{rmrkCn}, ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} WHERE EXPENSE_NO = #{expenseNo} AND APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
